title: Chain 1/8: Move-in Registration
scene: 你刚搬进小区，去物业前台登记。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 物业办公室，有什么可以帮您？
turns.en: Property management. How can I help?

turns.cn: 我新搬来802，来办入住登记。
turns.en: I just moved into 802. I'm here to register.

turns.cn: 请出示租约和身份证。
turns.en: Please show your lease and ID.

turns.cn: 在这，门禁卡怎么领？
turns.en: Here you go. How do I get access cards?

turns.cn: 登记后发两张，丢卡补办二十块。
turns.en: Two after registration. Replacement is twenty dollars.

turns.cn: 垃圾和快递规则有手册吗？
turns.en: Is there a handbook for trash and package rules?

title: Chain 2/8: HOA Fee Question
scene: 你收到物业费账单，询问涨幅原因。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我收到物业费涨了，能解释一下吗？
turns.en: I got a notice that HOA fees went up. Can you explain?

turns.cn: 今年电梯维修基金增加了每月二十块。
turns.en: The elevator reserve fund added twenty dollars a month this year.

turns.cn: 有会议纪要可以看吗？
turns.en: Are there meeting minutes I can review?

turns.cn: 在业主网站上下载，上个月已通过。
turns.en: They're on the owner portal. The vote passed last month.

turns.cn: 好的，怎么在线缴费？
turns.en: Okay. How do I pay online?

turns.cn: 登录业主账户，用银行卡即可。
turns.en: Log into your owner account and use a bank card.

title: Chain 3/8: Parking Permit
scene: 你向物业申请小区停车许可证。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想办一张住户停车证。
turns.en: I'd like to get a resident parking permit.

turns.cn: 请填表，附车辆登记和保险复印件。
turns.en: Fill out this form with a copy of registration and insurance.

turns.cn: 访客停车怎么算？
turns.en: What about guest parking?

turns.cn: 访客区两小时免费，超时会被拖。
turns.en: Guest spots are free for two hours. After that, towing is possible.

turns.cn: 地下车位可以另租吗？
turns.en: Can I rent an underground spot separately?

turns.cn: 有等候名单，目前要等两个月。
turns.en: There's a waitlist. About two months right now.

title: Chain 4/8: Pick Up Package
scene: 你的快递在物业快递室，你去取。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 你好，有我的包裹吗？姓张。
turns.en: Hi, do you have a package for Zhang?

turns.cn: 有几个，请出示证件。
turns.en: A few. May I see your ID?

turns.cn: 这个大箱子是我的，能借小推车吗？
turns.en: This big box is mine. Can I borrow a dolly?

turns.cn: 可以，用完还到门口。
turns.en: Sure. Return it to the entrance when you're done.

turns.cn: 快递室几点关？
turns.en: What time does the package room close?

turns.cn: 晚上九点，节假日到六点。
turns.en: Nine PM. Six on holidays.

title: Chain 5/8: Report a Repair
scene: 电梯坏了，你打电话报修。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: B座电梯卡在五楼不动了。
turns.en: Elevator B is stuck on the fifth floor.

turns.cn: 有人在里面吗？
turns.en: Is anyone inside?

turns.cn: 没有，我刚走出来它就停了。
turns.en: No. I just stepped out and it stopped.

turns.cn: 已通知维保，大概三十分钟到。
turns.en: Maintenance is notified. They'll be here in about thirty minutes.

turns.cn: 另一台电梯够用吗？早高峰怕挤。
turns.en: Is the other elevator enough? Rush hour might be crowded.

turns.cn: 会加保安维持秩序，抱歉不便。
turns.en: We'll have security manage the line. Sorry for the inconvenience.

title: Chain 6/8: Noise Complaint
scene: 楼上长期噪音，你向物业投诉。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想投诉502长期深夜噪音。
turns.en: I'd like to file a complaint about unit 502. Loud noise late at night.

turns.cn: 什么时候？持续多久了？
turns.en: When does it happen? How long has it been going on?

turns.cn: 几乎每晚十一点后，两周了。
turns.en: Almost every night after eleven. For two weeks.

turns.cn: 我们会发书面警告，请留记录。
turns.en: We'll send a written warning. Please keep a log.

turns.cn: 需要录音吗？
turns.en: Should I record it?

turns.cn: 可以，但注意当地法律。
turns.en: You can, but check local laws on recording.

title: Chain 7/8: Renovation Permit
scene: 你要装修厨房，去物业办施工许可。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 我想装修厨房，需要报备吗？
turns.en: I want to renovate my kitchen. Do I need a permit?

turns.cn: 要，填施工表，交押金五百。
turns.en: Yes. Fill out a work form and pay a five-hundred-dollar deposit.

turns.cn: 施工时间有限制吗？
turns.en: Are there restricted hours?

turns.cn: 工作日九点到六点，周末禁止噪音施工。
turns.en: Weekdays nine to six. No noisy work on weekends.

turns.cn: 押金什么时候退？
turns.en: When is the deposit refunded?

turns.cn: 验收合格后两周内。
turns.en: Within two weeks after final inspection.

title: Chain 8/8: Owners Meeting
scene: 物业通知开业主大会，你打电话确认。（对话链：物业）

turns.cn: 业主大会周六上午十点，社区活动室。
turns.en: The owners meeting is Saturday at ten AM in the community room.

turns.cn: 主要议题是什么？
turns.en: What's on the agenda?

turns.cn: 绿化改造和门禁升级预算。
turns.en: Landscaping upgrades and access control budget.

turns.cn: 不能到场能委托投票吗？
turns.en: Can I assign a proxy vote if I can't attend?

turns.cn: 可以，填委托书提前交。
turns.en: Yes. Submit a proxy form in advance.

turns.cn: 好的，我尽量参加。
turns.en: Okay. I'll try to be there.
